title: stephanomeria virgata var. tomentosa
intro: Stephanomeria virgata var. tomentosa is a variety of the woolly prairie clover or woolly phacelia, a flowering plant native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Stephanomeria virgata var. tomentosa include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and are often used to treat various ailments, such as wounds, colds, and respiratory issues.
